markdown:
<title level="1" right="Gunslinger Way " pfs="Standard">[Way of the Drifter](/Ways.aspx?ID=1)</title>

**Source** [Guns & Gears (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=98) pg. 108

You're a wanderer traveling from land to land with your gun and a melee weapon as company. Maybe you learned to fight with blade and pistol as a Shackles pirate, mastered the hand cannon and katana in Minkai, or practiced with a hatchet and clan pistol in Dongun Hold. You win battles by relying on mobility and flexible use of your weapons.

**Way Skill** [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=1)

<document level="3" id="action-906" />

<document level="3" id="action-909" />

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Gunslinger Way " pfs="Standard">[Way of the Vanguard](/Ways.aspx?ID=10)</title>

**Source** [Guns & Gears](/Sources.aspx?ID=318) pg. 110

You practice a unique combat style originated by dwarven siege engineers, using heavy weapons with wide attack areas to blast holes through enemy lines, clear an opening for your allies, and defend the conquered territory.

**Way Skill** [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=3)

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Gunslinger Way " pfs="Standard">[Way of the Spellshot](/Ways.aspx?ID=11)</title>

**Source** [Guns & Gears](/Sources.aspx?ID=318) pg. 140

**Prerequisites:** You must be a [gunslinger](/Classes.aspx?ID=20).

You’ve learned the intricacies of magic and technology, blending the two together with deadly results. You combine a knowledge of arcane theories with a strong connection to your chosen weapon that allows you to manifest unique effects, though your knowledge doesn’t extend as far as actual spellcasting. You can imbue energy into your weapon and conjure bullets from thin air. As you progress, you eventually learn to phase bullets through walls or even to teleport yourself along the path of your bullets. 

You must select [Spellshot Dedication](/Feats.aspx?ID=3267) as your 2nd-level class feat.

**Way Skill** [Arcana](/Skills.aspx?ID=2)

<title level="2">Slinger's Reload</title>
<document level="3" id="action-3691" />

<title level="2">Initial Deed</title>
<document level="3" id="action-3692" />

<title level="2" right="Level 9">Advanced Deed</title>
<document level="3" id="action-3694" />

<title level="2" right="Level 15">Greater Deed</title>
<document level="3" id="action-3695" />
name: Way of the Spellshot

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Gunslinger Way " pfs="Standard">[Way of the Pistolero](/Ways.aspx?ID=2)</title>

**Source** [Guns & Gears (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=98) pg. 109

Whether you're a professional duelist or a pistol-twirling entertainer, you have quick feet and quicker hands that never seem to let you down, and an equally sharp wit and tongue that jab your foes. You might leave a hand free or cultivate the ambidexterity for twin weapons. Either way, you stay close enough to your enemies to leverage your superior reflexes while leaving enough space to safely fire.

**Way Skill** [Deception](/Skills.aspx?ID=5)
 or [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=7)

<document level="3" id="action-913" />

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Gunslinger Way " pfs="Standard">[Way of the Sniper](/Ways.aspx?ID=3)</title>

**Source** [Guns & Gears (Remastered)](/Sources.aspx?ID=98) pg. 109

You practice a style of shooting that relies on unerring accuracy and perfect placement of your first shot. You keep hidden or at a distance, staying out of the fray and bringing unseen death to your foes.

**Way Skill** [Stealth](/Skills.aspx?ID=15)

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Gunslinger Way " pfs="Standard">[Way of the Triggerbrand](/Ways.aspx?ID=6)</title>

**Source** [Impossible Lands](/Sources.aspx?ID=146) pg. 107

You prefer firearms that work well as weapons in both melee and ranged combat, particularly those that allow you to exercise a bit of style and flair. You might be a survivor who cobbled your weapon together from the City of Smog's street scrap or a noble wielder of a master smith's bespoke commission for duels among Alkenstar's elite. In addition to the [combination](/Traits.aspx?ID=417) weapons presented in _Pathfinder Guns & Gears_, you gain access to the [triggerbrand](/Weapons.aspx?ID=257) combination weapon.

**Way Skill** [Thievery](/Skills.aspx?ID=17)

<title level="2">Slinger's Reload</title>
<document level="3" id="action-1454" />

<title level="2">Initial Deed</title>
<document level="3" id="action-1455" />

<title level="2" right="Level 9">Advanced Deed</title>
<document level="3" id="action-1456" />

<title level="2" right="Level 15">Greater Deed</title>
<document level="3" id="action-1457" />
name: Way of the Triggerbrand
